user.title: Welcome to Veton
user.description:
This wizard will set up your **Veton EV charger** with Home Assistant.

When you press **Next**, we will scan the network for your CHARX controller.

- (Optional) A HomeWizard P1 meter for energy management

Press **Next** to begin.

charger.title: Connect your charger
charger.description:
We found **{discovered_count}** charger(s) on the network.

Select your charger from the list, or enter the IP address manually.

p1_choice.title: Mains energy meter
p1_choice.description:
A mains energy meter (like the HomeWizard P1) enables smart charging features:

- **Solar surplus charging** — use your own solar energy
- **Capacity limitation** — prevent mains fuse overload
- **Peak shaving** — reduce capacity tariff costs

Do you want to add a meter?

p1_setup.title: Connect your P1 meter
p1_setup.description:
We found **{discovered_count}** P1 meter(s) on the network.

Select your meter or enter the IP address manually.

Make sure the local API is enabled in the HomeWizard Energy app (Settings > Meters > your meter > Local API).

data.p1_host: P1 meter IP address (or leave empty if selected above)

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the CHARX controller. Check the IP address, ensure port 502 is open, and the Modbus server is running.
error.no_host: Please select a discovered charger or enter an IP address manually.
error.p1_cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the P1 meter. Check the IP address and ensure the local API is enabled in the HomeWizard Energy app.
error.p1_no_host: Please enter an IP address or select a discovered device.

abort.already_configured: This charger connector is already configured.
abort.not_veton_device: This device is not a Veton charger.
